blocks.text: Provider capability, protocol, and priority are owned by public `riido-contracts/docs/20-domain/provider-capability.md`. This surface records only how provider adapters appear inside the C4 Provider Runtime context.

rows: `claude -p --output-format stream-json` stdout is consumed as NDJSON; session id is extracted from the `system.init` line.
`codex --sandbox danger-full-access app-server --listen stdio://` JSON-RPC; daemon owns the full-access harness envelope.
`openclaw agent --local --json`; unsupported CLI folds into unavailable through calendar-version gate.
`cursor-agent -p --output-format stream-json` root-print shape; version/profile differences require explicit launch profile.

blocks.text: All four adapters implement the same `Provider` port and emit the same `ProviderEventDraft` surface. Adapter-specific branching is by `ProtocolKind` only.
